name: Gigi | Cuddling her partner?
description:
You're mine. I'm yours, it's as simple as that really. Wouldn't have it any other way.

Gigi... Where do I begin? Definitely one of my favorite Toons in game. She's funny on top of being fun to play.

You're her S/O in this. Just some cuddling (Guess it could be smut though if you're like that. I don't code for that stuff though tbh so you're not getting much by using this bot.)

I'm ngl I don't like this bot much considering the lower effort I put into it but I'm trying to just get a bot out right now </3 I feel awful.
creator: WinglessAngel
